items.label: Business / LegalService schema
items.detail: No Organization, LocalBusiness, LegalService, or Attorney type found.
items.fix: Add a LegalService or LocalBusiness JSON-LD block with name, address, phone, and area served.

items.detail: No business entity to evaluate fields on.
items.fix: Add a LegalService or LocalBusiness block first, then populate name, address, telephone, and areaServed.

items.label: FAQPage schema
items.detail: Not found. FAQ schema packages common questions for search and AI answer engines.
items.fix: Add FAQPage structured data wrapping your most common client questions and answers.

items.detail: Not found. Review schema can support star ratings in search results.
items.fix: Add AggregateRating or Review schema for your client testimonials.

items.detail: Not found. Breadcrumb markup improves site hierarchy signals.
items.fix: Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD showing the page's position in your site structure.

items.detail: No training-only crawlers blocked. Your content may be used to train AI models.
items.fix: Add Disallow rules for GPTBot, CCBot, and Bytespider in robots.txt if you want to control AI training use.

items.label: Entity description
items.detail: A meta description exists, but no named business entity is described in structured data.
items.fix: Add a LegalService or Organization schema block with a clear name and description.

items.label: Attorney / person schema
items.detail: No Attorney or Person schema. AI systems weight identified, credentialed authors.
items.fix: Add Attorney or Person schema for the firm's lawyers, linked to the business entity.

items.label: Question-format headings
items.detail: Only 2 question headings. More can help AI systems pull answers from the page.
items.fix: Reframe section headings as questions people actually ask, like "What happens if..." or "How long does..."

items.label: Direct-answer sentences
items.detail: Content includes clear definitional sentences that AI models can extract as answers.

items.label: Authoritative citations
items.detail: No outbound links to authoritative legal sources.
items.fix: Link to government, court, or law-society resources where relevant. Corroborating links are a useful credibility signal.

items.label: Author / reviewer signals
items.detail: No author or reviewer attribution. Identified authorship is a useful credibility signal for search and AI.
items.fix: Add author metadata or Person schema, and a reviewed-by line where a lawyer has checked the content.

issues.title: Redirect chain
issues.detail: 1 redirect hop before the final page.
issues.fix: Point internal links at the final URL so visitors and crawlers skip the redirects.

issues.title: AI training bot control
issues.detail: No training-only crawlers blocked. Your content may be used to train AI models.
issues.fix: Add Disallow rules for GPTBot, CCBot, and Bytespider in robots.txt if you want to control AI training use.

issues.title: Render-blocking resources
issues.detail: 2 render-blocking resources in <head>.
issues.fix: Add async or defer to scripts. Use media="print" for non-critical stylesheets.

issues.title: Heading hierarchy
issues.detail: Heading levels are skipped (for example H1 then H3).
issues.fix: Use sequential heading levels without skipping.
